provides: LLM facade: JSON completion, translation, transcription and summarization in front of swappable model / speech-to-text / image-generation providers (Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible, Claude Code CLI, whisper-http, ElevenLabs, AssemblyAI, openai-images), with a prompt cache and a per-call token ledger. Python port of a prior NestJS service — same HTTP paths/contracts, plus an in-process comm surface for monolith deployments.

curated.summary: LLM provider used when a completion request names none, resolved against the merged PROVIDERS registry (conf.py, MODULE.md 'LLM providers').
Speech-to-text provider used when a transcription request pins none and no language route matches (conf.py, MODULE.md).
Image-generation provider used when a request pins none, resolved against the merged IMAGE_PROVIDERS registry (conf.py, MODULE.md).
Per-source cache-by-prompt policy; the default answers from the latest matching success row within CACHE_TTL (conf.py, MODULE.md Settings table).

extension_points.name: PROVIDERS
extension_points.summary: Flagship seam: MERGE over providers.BUILTIN_PROVIDERS (anthropic/openai-compat/claude-code); None/'' removes a name; also extendable at runtime via register_provider(name, cls_or_path). ABC contract: complete()/resolve_model()/supports_images (MODULE.md 'LLM providers — open registry').

extension_points.name: STT_PROVIDERS
extension_points.summary: MERGE over stt.BUILTIN_STT_PROVIDERS (whisper-http/elevenlabs/assemblyai); same merge semantics as PROVIDERS (conf.py, MODULE.md Settings table).

extension_points.name: IMAGE_PROVIDERS
extension_points.summary: MERGE over images.BUILTIN_IMAGE_PROVIDERS (openai-images); same merge semantics as PROVIDERS (conf.py, MODULE.md Settings table).

extension_points.name: CACHE_POLICY
extension_points.summary: Dotted path to a CachePolicy subclass, in import_strings, instantiated per call (conf.py, MODULE.md 'Cache policy').

requires.reason: the only stapel-* dependency: AppSettings, comm bus for in-process calls (pyproject.toml dependency)
